headline: Asian Community Development Council Joins the Sands Cares Accelerator
summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) today announced that the Asian Community Development Council (ACDC) has joined the Sands Cares Accelerator, the company's three-year membership program aimed at advancing nonprofits to deliver greater community impact.
